title: Iterative Network Pruning with Uncertainty Regularization for Lifelong Sentiment Classification

authors.name: Binzong Geng
authors.note: This work was done when Binzong Geng interned at SIAT, Chinese Academy of Sciences.

authors.name: Fajie Yuan
authors.note: This work was done when Fajie Yuan worked at Tencent (past affiliation) and Westlake University (current affiliation).

publication.conference: 44th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval (SIGIR '21)

method.name: IPRLS (Iterative Pruning with Residual Learning System)
key_features: Task-specific low-dimensional residual function in parallel to each layer of BERT
Enables positive backward transfer (learning new tasks improves performance on past tasks)
Protects old knowledge from being lost when learning new tasks

experiments.results: IPRLS significantly outperforms strong baselines for lifelong sentiment classification

ccs_classifications: Applied Computing: Document Management and Text Processing
